tips.subject: Mathematics
tips.title: Factorising Quadratics
tips.content: When factorising ax² + bx + c = 0, find two numbers that multiply to ac and add to b.

tips.subject: Mathematics
tips.title: Exponential Equations
tips.content: For equations with same base, you can equate exponents. If 2ˣ = 2ʸ, then x = y.

tips.subject: Mathematics
tips.title: Differentiation Rules
tips.content: Power rule: d/dx(xⁿ) = nxⁿ⁻¹. Product rule: (fg)' = f'g + fg'. Chain rule: dy/dx = dy/du × du/dx.

tips.subject: Mathematics
tips.title: Integration Basics
tips.content: ∫xⁿdx = xⁿ⁺¹/(n+1) + C (n≠-1). ∫eˣdx = eˣ + C. ∫1/x dx = ln|x| + C.

tips.subject: Mathematics
tips.title: Double Angle Formulas
tips.content: sin2θ = 2sinθcosθ. cos2θ = cos²θ - sin²θ = 2cos²θ - 1 = 1 - 2sin²θ.

tips.subject: Physical Sciences
tips.title: Newton's Second Law
tips.content: F = ma. Force equals mass times acceleration. Units: Newton (N) = kg·m/s²

tips.subject: Physical Sciences
tips.title: Kinetic Energy
tips.content: KE = ½mv². Kinetic energy depends on mass and velocity squared.

tips.subject: Physical Sciences
tips.title: Potential Energy
tips.content: PE = mgh. Gravitational potential energy depends on mass, gravity, and height.

tips.subject: Physical Sciences
tips.title: Coulomb's Law
tips.content: F = kq₁q₂/r². Force between two charges is proportional to product of charges and inversely proportional to square of distance.

tips.subject: Physical Sciences
tips.title: Right-Hand Rule
tips.content: Point thumb in current direction, fingers curl in magnetic field direction. Used for wires and solenoids.

tips.subject: Physical Sciences
tips.title: Atomic Structure
tips.content: Protons determine element identity, neutrons add mass, electrons determine reactivity. Atomic number = protons.

tips.subject: Physical Sciences
tips.title: Periodic Trends
tips.content: Across period: atomic size decreases, electronegativity increases. Down group: atomic size increases.

tips.subject: Physical Sciences
tips.title: Oxidation Numbers
tips.content: O is usually -2, H is +1 (except metal hydrides). Sum of oxidation numbers = 0 for compounds.

tips.subject: Physical Sciences
tips.title: Functional Groups
tips.content: Alkanes: C-C single. Alkenes: C=C double. Alcohols: -OH. Carboxylic acids: -COOH. Esters: -COO-.

tips.subject: English
tips.title: Essay Structure
tips.content: PQE: Point, Quote, Explanation. State your point, support with evidence, explain how it answers the question.

tips.subject: English
tips.title: Poetry Analysis
tips.content: TPCASTT: Title, Paraphrase, Connotation, Attitude, Shift, Title, Theme. Use this framework for poetry analysis.

tips.subject: English
tips.title: Reading Strategy
tips.content: Read questions first, then scan text for keywords. Focus on first and last sentences of paragraphs.

tips.subject: Afrikaans
tips.title: Opstel Struktuur
tips.content: Inleiding (hook + thesis), Liggaam (3 paragrawe), Slotsom (opsomming + verband met thesis).

tips.subject: History
tips.title: Essay Structure
tips.content: Introduction (context + argument), Body (topic sentences + evidence), Conclusion (restate argument + significance).

tips.subject: History
tips.title: Soweto 1976
tips.content: June 16, 1976 - Student protests against Afrikaans medium policy. Hector Pieterson killed. Sparked international awareness.
